description: Using Epi Info 7 Classic Analysis, process the Oswego outbreak data from the Sample project (C:\Epi Info 7\Resources\Projects\Sample\Sample.prj). Create a dataset containing only ill patients (ILL = 'Yes') and include a new numeric variable named 'FoodCount' representing the sum of positive responses ('Yes') for the following food items: BAKEDHAM, SPINACH, MASHEDPOTA, CABBAGESAL, JELLO, ROLLS, BROWNBREAD, MILK, COFFEE, WATER, CAKES, VANILLAICE, CHOCOLATE, and FRUITCUP. Export the resulting dataset to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\OswegoIllExport.csv.
